body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Computer Science. Grade level: Class XI / Class XII. Session: Computer Systems and Organisation - Session 2. Concept: The Fetch-Decode-Execute Cycle. Visual requirement: A circular flowchart with three arrows: Fetch -> Decode -> Execute -> (loop back to) Fetch. Each arrow should be labeled clearly. An image of a conveyor belt moving boxes, representing the continuous loop of instructions being processed one by one. Style: textbook-friendly, scientific, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, centered composition, white or light background, student-safe. Important: do not draw any words, letters, labels, captions, heading text, numbering, or watermark inside the image. Show the concept visually only. Keep all explanation outside the image. Prefer clean shapes, arrows without text, color-coded parts, and simple educational composition.

options.negative_prompt: no words, no text, no letters, no typography, no labels, no captions, no title text, no handwritten text, no gibberish text, no watermark
